2606.23321.title: Tmax: A simple recipe for terminal agents
2606.23321.paper_summary: Terminal-using agents have quickly become the most popular downstream application of language models (LMs). Despite their prevalence, relatively little academic work has examined RL-based training of these models, likely due to difficult benchmarks, a lack of data, and a lack of simple baseline recipes. We present Tmax, the strongest open RL recipe for terminal agents to date, bringing open data recipes closer to the frontier. While simple, our recipe achieves 27\% on Terminal-Bench 2.0 with only 9B parameters, outperforming much larger models from prior work. Concretely, we generate data using a novel taxonomy, combining difficulty control, personas, and verifier diversification, which allows us to cheaply generate large amounts of terminal environments for RL and SFT training. We open-source our terminal dataset, which is over 2.5x larger than previously released terminal-agent datasets. We then train open-weight models using RL with our data, using a simple, outcome-only recipe. We release our data, models, and code as a strong baseline for future open academic work on terminal agents at https://github.com/hamishivi/tmax.
2606.23321.paper_summary_zh: 終端使用代理已迅速成為語言模型（LMs）最受歡迎的下游應用。儘管它們普遍存在，但相對較少的學術工作檢視了這些模型的基於強化學習（RL）的訓練，這可能是由於困難的基準、數據的缺乏以及缺乏簡單的基線食譜。我們提出了Tmax，迄今為止最強的開放RL食譜，為終端代理帶來了更接近前沿的開放數據食譜。雖然簡單，我們的食譜在Terminal-Bench 2.0上達到了27\%，僅用9B參數，超越了先前工作中的更大模型。具體而言，我們使用一種新穎的分類法生成數據，結合了難度控制、角色和驗證者多樣化，這使我們能夠以低成本生成大量終端環境，用於RL和SFT訓練。我們開放了我們的終端數據集，該數據集比先前發布的終端代理數據集大超過2.5倍。然後，我們使用RL和我們的數據訓練開放權重模型，使用一種簡單的僅結果食譜。我們將數據、模型和代碼釋放為未來終端代理開放學術工作的強基線，網址為https://github.com/hamishivi/tmax。
2606.23321.author: Hamish Ivison et.al.
2606.23321.authors: Hamish Ivison, Junjie Oscar Yin, Rulin Shao, Teng Xiao, Nathan Lambert, Hannaneh Hajishirzi
